meta.lastKnownBaseline: Vol.11 closeout: Minimum Context / AI Board Always-On / Active Next Lock

activeRuntimeBoard.northStar: Visible cockpit first: reduce lookup time before adding automation
activeRuntimeBoard.activeNextLock: Build only one HTML page, one CSS file, and one mock JSON file

aiBoardStrip.signal: Visible static MVP over governance expansion
One-screen cockpit, no deep lookup required
Forbidden scope displayed as a persistent bar
Panels prove what state is visible and what is intentionally mocked

keyRisks: GOOG below recovery zone: watch 350 / 355 / 370 levels
NVDA repair zone: watch 204 / 208 confirmation and 198 risk line
SOXL / GGLL / GDXU / UGL remain no-chase unless rules change
USDT defense target remains above 70% in crypto sleeve
lddRiskVisibility.executionSourceOfTruth: Broker / Binance screenshots and order-detail evidence, not live feed

coverage: AI and megacap: NVDA, GOOG, QQQ, SMH
Semiconductor and leverage radar: SOXL, SOXS, INTC, AMD
Memory / storage: MU, WDC, SNDK, STX, DRAM ETF
Gold and miners: GLD, UGL, GDXU
Crypto: BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE, ZEC
Dream Sleeve: SPCX / SpaceX-style support positions
lddMarketMapV2.rule: Coverage does not imply trade permission; no-chase list overrides radar interest.

wc2026MultiLedger.principle: High-odds is not the same as main recommendation; score accuracy is secondary to direction and risk classification.

activeNext.nextStep: Open index.html locally and review one-screen readability before adding any new layer.
